info.title: EdgeStore API
info.description: Management and runtime APIs for EdgeStore accounts, projects, buckets, files, and credentials.

tags.name: management
tags.description: Administrative operations authenticated with a management credential.

tags.name: runtime
tags.description: Application-facing file operations authenticated with a project credential or permitted management credential.

managementBearer.description: A management token or customer dashboard session token.

projectKeyBasic.description: A project access key as the username and project secret key as the password.

RequestId.description: Identifier for correlating the request with EdgeStore logs.

RetryAfter.description: Seconds to wait before checking the asynchronous operation again.

status.description: HTTP status code returned with the error.

path.description: Location of the invalid value in the request.

details.description: Structured details specific to this error code.

status.description: HTTP status code returned with the error.

message.default: This credential cannot access this operation

status.description: HTTP status code returned with the error.

message.default: The credential is missing a required scope

status.description: HTTP status code returned with the error.

status.description: HTTP status code returned with the error.
HTTP status code returned with the error.

StorageLimitExceededError.description: The account storage limit has been exceeded

message.default: The account storage limit has been exceeded

status.description: HTTP status code returned with the error.

RestoreNotAllowedError.description: The account plan does not support file restoration

message.default: The account plan does not support file restoration

status.description: HTTP status code returned with the error.

SignedReadUrlNotAvailableError.description: Signed read URLs are not available for this file

message.default: Signed read URLs are not available for this file

status.description: HTTP status code returned with the error.

LastOwnerError.description: An account must retain an owner

message.default: An account must retain an owner

ProjectLimitReachedError.description: The account project limit has been reached

message.default: The account project limit has been reached

id.description: Unique file ID. Also used as the upload ID.

key.description: Storage key relative to the project.

thumbnailUrl.description: Canonical thumbnail URL, or null when unavailable.

thumbnailKey.description: Thumbnail storage key, or null when unavailable.

bucketId.description: ID of the bucket containing the file.

bucketName.description: Name of the bucket containing the file.

projectId.description: ID of the project that owns the file.

accountId.description: ID of the account that owns the project.

name.description: File name, including its extension when present.

path.description: Configured path fields for the file.

metadata.description: Custom metadata attached to the file.

mimeType.description: File media type, or null when not provided.

temporary.description: Whether the file still requires explicit confirmation.

name.description: Bucket name, unique within the project.

projectId.description: ID of the project that owns the bucket.

accountId.description: ID of the account that owns the project.

type.description: Bucket content type. Image buckets support thumbnails.

visibility.description: Read visibility. Protected buckets require signed read URLs.

usageBytes.description: Current bucket storage usage in bytes.

Bucket.description: An EdgeStore file or image bucket.

get.description: Checks whether API v2 is reachable and reports the active API version. This operation does not require authentication.
Returns the resolved management principal, its credential kind, and its effective management scopes.

clerkUserId.description: User ID from the identity provider.

accountId.description: User's personal account ID.
Owning account ID.

clerkUserId.description: User ID from the identity provider.

accountId.description: User's personal account ID.

get.description: Lists the active accounts visible to the current management credential, including plan limits, usage, and the caller's team role.

type.description: Whether the account belongs to one user or a team.

role.description: Current user's account role, or null for account-token authentication.

projectCount.description: Number of active projects in the account.

usageBytes.description: Current account storage usage in bytes.

isPaused.description: Whether write operations are paused for the account.

items.description: An account visible to the current management credential.

get.description: Returns plan limits, storage usage, project count, and the caller's role for one accessible account.

schema.description: Unique account ID.

type.description: Whether the account belongs to one user or a team.

role.description: Current user's account role, or null for account-token authentication.

projectCount.description: Number of active projects in the account.

usageBytes.description: Current account storage usage in bytes.

isPaused.description: Whether write operations are paused for the account.

account.description: An account visible to the current management credential.

post.description: Removes the current user from a team account. Personal accounts, account tokens, and the team's last owner cannot use this operation.

schema.description: Unique account ID.

get.description: Lists active projects owned by an accessible account in creation order.

schema.description: Unique account ID.

basePath.description: Globally unique project base path accepted anywhere projectRef is used.

accountId.description: ID of the account that owns the project.

usageBytes.description: Current project storage usage in bytes.

items.description: An EdgeStore project.

post.description: Creates a project in an account and, by default, returns its first project key. The secret key is returned only in this response.

schema.description: Unique account ID.
Makes creation retry-safe for 24 hours. Reusing a key with different input returns a conflict.

createKey.description: Whether to create and return an initial project key.

keyName.description: Name for the initial project key.

allowOverage.description: Allow billable creation beyond the included project limit.

basePath.description: Globally unique project base path accepted anywhere projectRef is used.

accountId.description: ID of the account that owns the project.

usageBytes.description: Current project storage usage in bytes.

accessKey.description: Public access-key portion used as the Basic Auth username.

projectId.description: ID of the project this key can access.

accountId.description: ID of the project's account.

revokedAt.description: ISO 8601 revocation timestamp, or null while active.

key.description: A project-scoped runtime credential without its secret.

secretKey.description: Secret-key portion returned once; store it securely.

get.description: Returns an accessible project resolved by its project ID or globally unique base path.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.

basePath.description: Globally unique project base path accepted anywhere projectRef is used.

accountId.description: ID of the account that owns the project.

usageBytes.description: Current project storage usage in bytes.

delete.description: Deletes an accessible project after its buckets and files have been removed.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.

get.description: Lists active buckets in an accessible project, including visibility and current storage usage.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.

post.description: Creates a file or image bucket and configures the path and custom metadata fields accepted by its files.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Makes creation retry-safe for 24 hours. Reusing a key with different input returns a conflict.

name.description: Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

type.description: Bucket content type. Image buckets support thumbnails.

visibility.description: Whether reads are public or require signed URLs.

path.description: Allowed path field names for files in this bucket.

custom.description: Allowed custom metadata field names for this bucket.

metadata.description: Metadata field configuration for the bucket.

get.description: Returns one active bucket by name from an accessible project.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

patch.description: Replaces the bucket's configured path and custom metadata field definitions.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

path.description: Allowed path field names for files in this bucket.

custom.description: Allowed custom metadata field names for this bucket.

delete.description: Deletes an empty bucket. Start an empty-bucket job first when the bucket contains files or incomplete uploads.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

post.description: Starts an asynchronous job that deletes files, aborts uploads, reconciles stored objects, and invalidates cached content for the bucket.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

bucketId.description: ID of the bucket being emptied.

status.description: Current job lifecycle state.

get.description: Returns the most recently created empty-bucket job for the selected bucket.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

bucketId.description: ID of the bucket being emptied.

accountId.description: ID of the project's account.

status.description: Current job lifecycle state.

totalCount.description: Number of file records selected for cleanup.

totalBytes.description: Total bytes represented by selected file records.

processedCount.description: Number of file records processed so far.

freedBytes.description: Storage bytes accounted as freed so far.

canceledUploadCount.description: Incomplete uploads canceled by the job.

orphanObjectCount.description: Stored objects found without matching active file records.

orphanBytes.description: Total bytes of orphaned stored objects found.

cloudFrontInvalidationId.description: Cache invalidation ID, or null until one is created.

error.description: Failure message, or null when the job has not failed.

heartbeatAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the latest worker heartbeat.

job.description: Progress and results for an asynchronous bucket cleanup.

get.description: Returns progress, cleanup counters, timestamps, and failure information for one empty-bucket job.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
Unique empty-bucket job ID.

bucketId.description: ID of the bucket being emptied.

accountId.description: ID of the project's account.

status.description: Current job lifecycle state.

totalCount.description: Number of file records selected for cleanup.

totalBytes.description: Total bytes represented by selected file records.

processedCount.description: Number of file records processed so far.

freedBytes.description: Storage bytes accounted as freed so far.

canceledUploadCount.description: Incomplete uploads canceled by the job.

orphanObjectCount.description: Stored objects found without matching active file records.

orphanBytes.description: Total bytes of orphaned stored objects found.

cloudFrontInvalidationId.description: Cache invalidation ID, or null until one is created.

error.description: Failure message, or null when the job has not failed.

heartbeatAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the latest worker heartbeat.

job.description: Progress and results for an asynchronous bucket cleanup.

post.description: Queues a retry of a failed empty-bucket job. Jobs that are active or already succeeded cannot be retried.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
Unique empty-bucket job ID.

bucketId.description: ID of the bucket being emptied.

status.description: Current job lifecycle state.

get.description: Lists active uploaded files in a bucket using an opaque cursor.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
Opaque cursor returned by the previous page.
Maximum number of files returned.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null at the end.

post.description: Resolves one file by ID, storage key, canonical URL, or bucket name and path.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.

anyOf.description: A file reference using exactly one supported identifier.

bucketName.description: Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

path.description: File path within the bucket.

file.description: A management file reference using exactly one supported form.

post.description: Creates read URLs for one or more files. Protected files receive expiring signed URLs; public files may return their canonical URLs.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.

anyOf.description: A file reference using exactly one supported identifier.

bucketName.description: Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

path.description: File path within the bucket.

items.description: A management file reference using exactly one supported form.

files.description: Files to create read URLs for.

expiresIn.description: Requested signed URL lifetime in seconds.

anyOf.description: A file reference using exactly one supported identifier.

bucketName.description: Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

path.description: File path within the bucket.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 expiration timestamp, or null for a public URL.

expiresIn.description: Lifetime in seconds, or null for a public URL.

post.description: Deletes multiple files and returns an ordered success or error result for every supplied file reference.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.

anyOf.description: A file reference using exactly one supported identifier.

bucketName.description: Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

path.description: File path within the bucket.

items.description: A management file reference using exactly one supported form.

anyOf.description: A file reference using exactly one supported identifier.

bucketName.description: Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

path.description: File path within the bucket.

anyOf.description: A file reference using exactly one supported identifier.

bucketName.description: Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

path.description: File path within the bucket.

results.description: Ordered per-file results matching the request.

post.description: Creates a logical upload and returns signed storage URLs for either a single request or the requested multipart parts.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
Makes creation retry-safe for 24 hours. Reusing a key with different input returns a conflict.

path.description: File path within the bucket.

fileName.description: Original file name. EdgeStore generates one when omitted.

extension.description: File extension without the leading dot.

temporary.description: Whether the file must later be confirmed.

metadata.description: Custom metadata values configured for the bucket.

items.description: One-based multipart part number.

partNumbers.description: Unique multipart part numbers to create signed URLs for.

multipart.description: Multipart upload configuration. Omit for a single upload.

expiresIn.description: Requested signed read URL lifetime in seconds.

includeThumbnails.description: Whether to also sign the thumbnail URL when available.

signedReadUrl.description: Request a signed read URL together with the upload.

id.description: Unique file ID. Also used as the upload ID.

key.description: Storage key relative to the project.

accountId.description: ID of the owning account.

signedUrl.description: Signed URL used to upload the object directly to storage.
Signed URL used to upload this part directly to storage.

signedThumbnailUrl.description: Expiring signed thumbnail URL when requested.

signedReadUrl.description: Signed read URLs requested with the upload.

get.description: Returns 202 while object processing continues, then returns the canonical file or canceled state. Follow Retry-After before polling again.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Logical upload ID returned when the upload was requested.

status.description: Processing completed and the canonical file is available.
The upload was canceled before completion.
The uploaded object is still being processed.

delete.description: Cancels an incomplete upload and aborts its multipart storage session when present. Repeating a successful cancellation is safe.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Logical upload ID returned when the upload was requested.

status.description: The upload was canceled before completion.

post.description: Creates or refreshes signed URLs for selected parts of an existing multipart upload.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Logical upload ID returned when the upload was requested.

items.description: One-based multipart part number.

partNumbers.description: Unique multipart part numbers to create signed URLs for.

signedUrl.description: Signed URL used to upload this part directly to storage.

post.description: Submits uploaded part ETags for assembly and returns 202 while EdgeStore processes the resulting object.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Logical upload ID returned when the upload was requested.

eTag.description: Opaque ETag returned by storage after uploading the part.

parts.description: Uploaded multipart parts to assemble, in any order.

status.description: The uploaded object is still being processed.

get.description: Lists project-key records without their secret keys, including revoked keys.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.

accessKey.description: Public access-key portion used as the Basic Auth username.

projectId.description: ID of the project this key can access.

accountId.description: ID of the project's account.

revokedAt.description: ISO 8601 revocation timestamp, or null while active.

items.description: A project-scoped runtime credential without its secret.

post.description: Creates a project credential. Its secret key is returned only in this response and cannot be retrieved later.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Makes creation retry-safe for 24 hours. Reusing a key with different input returns a conflict.

accessKey.description: Public access-key portion used as the Basic Auth username.

projectId.description: ID of the project this key can access.

accountId.description: ID of the project's account.

revokedAt.description: ISO 8601 revocation timestamp, or null while active.

key.description: A project-scoped runtime credential without its secret.

secretKey.description: Secret-key portion returned once; store it securely.

delete.description: Permanently revokes a project key so it can no longer authenticate runtime requests.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Unique project-key ID.

get.description: Lists a page of members in a team account. Personal accounts do not have members.

schema.description: Unique account ID.
One-based page number.
Maximum number of items returned per page.

accountId.description: ID of the team account.

role.description: Member permissions within a team account.

items.description: A member of a team account.

patch.description: Changes a team member's role. The last owner cannot be demoted.

schema.description: Unique account ID.
Unique user ID.

role.description: Member permissions within a team account.

accountId.description: ID of the team account.

role.description: Member permissions within a team account.

member.description: A member of a team account.

delete.description: Removes a user from a team account. The last owner cannot be removed.

schema.description: Unique account ID.
Unique user ID.

get.description: Lists a page of invitations for a team account, including active and terminal invitation states.

schema.description: Unique account ID.
One-based page number.
Maximum number of items returned per page.

accountId.description: ID of the invited team account.

role.description: Member permissions within a team account.

status.description: Current invitation lifecycle state.

items.description: An invitation to join a team account.

post.description: Creates a team invitation and queues its email for durable delivery. Reusing an idempotency key returns the original invitation.

schema.description: Unique account ID.
Makes creation retry-safe for 24 hours. Reusing a key with different input returns a conflict.

role.description: Member permissions within a team account.

allowOverage.description: Allow a billable seat beyond the included member limit.

accountId.description: ID of the invited team account.

role.description: Member permissions within a team account.

status.description: Current invitation lifecycle state.

invitation.description: An invitation to join a team account.

delete.description: Cancels an active team invitation and releases any seat reserved for it.

schema.description: Unique account ID.
Unique invitation ID.

post.description: Sends a new email for an active team invitation and returns its updated record.

schema.description: Unique account ID.
Unique invitation ID.

accountId.description: ID of the invited team account.

role.description: Member permissions within a team account.

status.description: Current invitation lifecycle state.

invitation.description: An invitation to join a team account.

get.description: Lists a page of management tokens owned by an account without exposing token secrets.

schema.description: Unique account ID.
One-based page number.
Maximum number of items returned per page.

kind.description: Whether the token is owned by an account or a user.

tokenPrefix.description: Non-secret token prefix used to identify the credential.

items.description: Permission granted to the management token.

lastUsedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the latest use, or null if unused.

revokedAt.description: ISO 8601 revocation timestamp, or null while active.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 expiration timestamp, or null for no expiration.

accountId.description: Owning account ID for account tokens, otherwise null.

userId.description: Owning user ID for user tokens, otherwise null.

items.description: A management credential without its secret.

post.description: Creates an account-owned management token with preset or explicit scopes. The token secret is returned only in this response.

schema.description: Unique account ID.
Makes creation retry-safe for 24 hours. Reusing a key with different input returns a conflict.

preset.description: Named permission set. Mutually exclusive with scopes.

items.description: Permission granted to the management token.

scopes.description: Explicit permissions. Mutually exclusive with preset.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 expiration timestamp, or null for no expiration.

userId.description: Owning user ID for user tokens, otherwise null.

token.description: A management credential without its secret.

secret.description: Bearer token secret returned once; store it securely.

schema.description: Unique management-token ID.

post.description: Creates an encrypted token that carries runtime context, resolved bucket paths, and optional access-control data.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.

context.description: Application-defined values embedded in the token.

propertyNames.description: Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

value.description: Resolved value for the path field.

path.description: Resolved path fields available to runtime operations.

accessControl.description: Opaque application access-control data embedded in the token.

buckets.description: Runtime bucket context keyed by bucket name.

token.description: Encrypted runtime bearer token; store it securely.

cursor.description: Opaque cursor returned by the previous page.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page, or null at the end.

post.description: Resolves one file in the authenticated project by file ID, storage key, or canonical URL.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.

file.description: A file reference using exactly one supported identifier.

post.description: Creates expiring read URLs for protected files and optionally their thumbnails.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.

items.description: Canonical file URL.

expiresIn.description: Requested signed URL lifetime in seconds.

includeThumbnails.description: Whether to also sign thumbnail URLs when available.

signedThumbnailUrl.description: Expiring signed thumbnail URL when requested.

post.description: Marks temporary files as permanent and returns an ordered result for every supplied file reference.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.

items.description: A file reference using exactly one supported identifier.

post.description: Soft-deletes multiple files and returns an ordered result for every supplied file reference.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.

items.description: A file reference using exactly one supported identifier.

post.description: Restores multiple soft-deleted files when the account plan permits restoration and returns one result per reference.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.

items.description: A file reference using exactly one supported identifier.

post.description: Creates a logical upload and returns signed storage URLs. The request can create a bucket, replace an existing file, or request multipart parts.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Bucket name. Starts with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens.
Makes creation retry-safe for 24 hours. Reusing a key with different input returns a conflict.

bucketType.description: Type used if the target bucket must be created.

visibility.description: Visibility used if the target bucket must be created.

fileName.description: Original file name. EdgeStore generates one when omitted.

temporary.description: Whether the file must later be confirmed.

value.description: Path segments separated by forward slashes.

path.description: Ordered path fields used to construct the file URL.

extension.description: File extension without the leading dot.

metadata.description: Custom metadata values configured for the bucket.

replaceTarget.description: Existing file to atomically replace after upload processing.

items.description: One-based multipart part number.

multipart.description: Multipart upload configuration. Omit for a single upload.

expiresIn.description: Requested signed read URL lifetime in seconds.

includeThumbnails.description: Whether to also sign the thumbnail URL when available.

signedReadUrl.description: Request a signed read URL together with the upload.

id.description: Unique file ID. Also used as the upload ID.

key.description: Storage key relative to the project.

accountId.description: ID of the owning account.

signedUrl.description: Signed URL used to upload the object directly to storage.
Signed URL used to upload this part directly to storage.

signedThumbnailUrl.description: Expiring signed thumbnail URL when requested.

signedReadUrl.description: Signed read URLs requested with the upload.

get.description: Returns 202 while object processing continues, then returns the canonical file or canceled state. Follow Retry-After before polling again.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Logical upload ID returned when the upload was requested.

status.description: Processing completed and the canonical file is available.
The upload was canceled before completion.
The uploaded object is still being processed.

delete.description: Cancels an incomplete upload and aborts its multipart storage session when present. Repeating a successful cancellation is safe.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Logical upload ID returned when the upload was requested.

status.description: The upload was canceled before completion.

post.description: Creates or refreshes signed URLs for selected parts of an existing multipart upload.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Logical upload ID returned when the upload was requested.

items.description: One-based multipart part number.

partNumbers.description: Multipart part numbers to create signed URLs for.

signedUrl.description: Signed URL used to upload this part directly to storage.

post.description: Submits uploaded part ETags for assembly and returns 202 while EdgeStore processes the resulting object.

schema.description: A project ID or globally unique base path.
Logical upload ID returned when the upload was requested.

eTag.description: Opaque ETag returned by storage after uploading the part.

parts.description: Uploaded multipart parts to assemble, in any order.

status.description: The uploaded object is still being processed.
